task_completion.description: Navigate to the Input API documentation page to find the write API key.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Emoncms Input API Help or documentation page loaded in the browser, displaying the Write API key.

task_completion.description: Post the specified data to the Emoncms API.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the agent executing an HTTP request (e.g., via browser address bar, curl in terminal, or a script) that includes the write API key, the node 'home', and the data payload containing 'power1': 1850 and 'solar': 920.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Emoncms Inputs page to verify the updated data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Emoncms 'Inputs' page loaded in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'power1' input under node 'home' reflects the updated value of 1850.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Emoncms Inputs page, under a node named 'home', there is an input named 'power1' displaying a value of 1850.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'solar' input under node 'home' reflects the updated value of 920.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Emoncms Inputs page, under a node named 'home', there is an input named 'solar' displaying a value of 920.

integrity.description: The agent used a genuine method to send the API request rather than simulating the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a real HTTP request execution in a terminal, API client, or browser URL bar, not just a text file containing an expected success message.

integrity.description: The verification of values happened in the actual Emoncms Inputs web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values 1850 and 920 must be visible within the standard Emoncms Inputs table layout in the browser, not in a mocked HTML file or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the input values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and actively modifying the DOM elements of the Inputs table to artificially display 1850 and 920.
